about.title: About WeCV AI
about.subtitle: WeCV AI is revolutionizing the way professionals create resumes. Our AI-powered platform combines cutting-edge technology with intuitive design to help job seekers worldwide land their dream jobs.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize professional resume creation by making AI-powered tools accessible to everyone. We believe that every professional deserves the opportunity to present their best self to potential employers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the world's leading AI-powered career platform, helping millions of professionals advance their careers through intelligent resume creation and career guidance.

stats.title: Our Impact
stats.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who have transformed their careers with WeCV AI

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These core values guide everything we do at WeCV AI

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously push the boundaries of AI technology to create cutting-edge resume solutions.

userFirst.title: User First
userFirst.description: Every feature we build is designed with our users' success in mind.

security.title: Security
security.description: Your data privacy and security are our top priorities.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: We serve professionals worldwide with multi-language support.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: WeCV AI was born from a simple observation: creating a professional resume shouldn't be complicated or expensive. In today's competitive job market, every detail matters, and traditional resume builders often fall short.
story.paragraph2: Our team of AI researchers, designers, and career experts came together to build something different. We combined the power of artificial intelligence with intuitive design to create a platform that not only helps you build beautiful resumes but also guides you through the process with intelligent suggestions.
story.paragraph3: Today, WeCV AI serves professionals in over 50 countries, helping them create resumes that stand out and get results. We're proud to be part of their career journey and committed to continuously improving our platform.

why.title: Why Choose WeCV AI?
why.reason2: Professional templates designed by career experts

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Career?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals who have already created stunning resumes with WeCV AI.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions and learn how to create the perfect resume with WeCV AI.

faq1.question: How do I create my first resume?
faq1.answer: Click "Start Creating" on the homepage, choose a template, and fill in your information. You can preview and edit your resume in real-time.

faq2.question: Can I save my resume without registering?
faq2.answer: You can create and preview resumes without registering, but you need to create an account to save and export your resumes.

faq3.question: What file formats can I export my resume in?
faq3.answer: Currently we support PDF export. More formats like Word and HTML will be available soon.

faq4.question: How does the AI writing assistant work?
faq4.answer: Our AI assistant can help you write professional descriptions for your experience, skills, and summary. Simply click the AI button next to any section.

faq5.question: Can I use multiple templates?
faq5.answer: Yes! You can switch between templates at any time. Your content will be preserved when switching templates.

faq6.question: Is my data secure?
faq6.answer: Yes, we take data security seriously. All your information is encrypted and stored securely. You can read our privacy policy for more details.

help.contactDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help you create the perfect resume.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. Learn about our data practices and security measures.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: We implement comprehensive data protection measures to safeguard your personal information and resume data.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard encryption protocols.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We are transparent about how we collect, use, and protect your data. You have full control over your information.

storage.title: Secure Storage
storage.description: Your data is stored on secure servers with multiple layers of protection and regular security audits.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Strict access controls ensure that only authorized personnel can access your data for legitimate purposes.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: We comply with international data protection regulations including GDPR, CCPA, and other applicable laws.

ssl.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
ssl.description: All communications between your browser and our servers are encrypted using SSL/TLS protocols.

backup.title: Regular Backups
backup.description: Your data is regularly backed up to secure locations to prevent data loss and ensure availability.

whatWeCollect.title: What We Collect
whatWeCollect.item4: Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)
whatWeCollect.item5: AI interaction data for service improvement
whatWeCollect.item6: Payment information (processed securely by third-party providers)

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Data
howWeUse.item1: To provide and improve our resume building services
howWeUse.item2: To personalize your experience and offer relevant features
howWeUse.item3: To communicate with you about your account and services
howWeUse.item4: To ensure platform security and prevent fraud
howWeUse.item5: To analyze usage patterns and improve our AI features
howWeUse.item6: To comply with legal obligations and regulations

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your data only as long as necessary to provide our services. You can request deletion of your data at any time.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.description: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our platform.

access.title: Access Your Data
access.description: You have the right to access all personal data we hold about you and request copies of your information.

control.title: Control Your Data
control.description: You can update, correct, or modify your personal information at any time through your account settings.

deletion.title: Delete Your Data
deletion.description: You can request deletion of your account and all associated data. We will process your request within 30 days.

portability.title: Data Portability
portability.description: You can export your resume data in standard formats and transfer it to other services if needed.

objection.title: Object to Processing
objection.description: You have the right to object to certain types of data processing and request restrictions.

withdraw.title: Withdraw Consent
withdraw.description: You can withdraw your consent for data processing at any time, where processing is based on consent.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and provide personalized content.

types.analytics: Analytics cookies to understand usage patterns
types.preferences: Preference cookies to remember your settings

cookies.management: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings or our cookie consent tool.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.description: We may use third-party services for analytics, payment processing, and customer support. These services have their own privacy policies.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.description: Our services are not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

international.title: International Data Transfers
international.description: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.

privacy.title: Privacy Questions
privacy.description: If you have questions about our privacy practices or want to exercise your data rights, please contact our privacy team.

security.title: Security Concerns
security.description: If you discover a security vulnerability or have concerns about data security, please report it to our security team immediately.

dpo.title: Data Protection Officer
dpo.description: For GDPR-related inquiries, you can contact our Data Protection Officer.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes via email or through our platform.

buyMeACoffee.title: Love WeCV AI?
buyMeACoffee.subtitle: If you find our AI-powered resume builder helpful, consider buying us a coffee to support the development of more amazing features!

small.title: Small Coffee
small.description: Perfect for a quick thank you
